title: AI Response Instruction
description: AI v1 response instruction contract that states what the channel may send after claim, privacy, quote, and handoff guards.
$comment: Sources: PACK-05 and TECH-05. AI response must be public-safe, cannot invent claims, cannot expose internal formula/cost/supplier/QC/MISA/private data, and cannot state final price without QuoteSnapshot.

instruction_type.description: Instruction type such as respond, ask_for_private_handoff, recommend, or human_handoff. TODO: define official values.

allowed_to_send.description: Whether instruction is allowed to be delivered.

public_safe.description: Whether content is safe for public channel.

quote_snapshot_id.description: QuoteSnapshot reference required for final price.

order_draft_id.description: Order Draft reference if AI is handing off to Commerce.

prohibited_content_flags.description: Blocked content categories. TODO: define official taxonomy.
